Description: A daytime view of the Eiffel Tower beside the Seine, with people along the riverside. I chose this place because it’s one of the most iconic and romantic cityscapes in the world.
A calm sunrise view near London Bridge and the River Thames. I chose it for the iconic riverside walk and peaceful morning feel.
The image shows camels resting in the desert with the Pyramids of Giza behind them. I chose this place because it combines famous ancient history with a beautiful desert view.

Description: A bright, detailed photo of the Roman Colosseum with a wide view. I chose it because it’s a famous landmark that reflects the greatness of ancient Rome.
A charming blue-and-white street in Carthage with Mediterranean-style buildings and plants. I chose it because the colors feel calm and coastal, giving a relaxed travel vibe.

Description: A scenic view of the Great Wall of China stretching across misty mountains with autumn colors. I chose this place because it feels historic and powerful, yet calm and peaceful in the fog.

Description: A vertical photo of Petra’s carved tomb. I chose this place because it highlights the impressive ancient design and the unique sandstone scenery.
A busy Tokyo crosswalk with people holding umbrellas under neon lights. I chose this place because it shows the city’s energy and the cinematic feel of walking in the rain.
A city travel photo of a sightseeing bus passing by Istanbul’s famous domes. I chose this place because it shows both daily life and the city’s historic architecture in one scene.
A square photo of Saint Basil’s Cathedral in Red Square, Moscow, under a cloudy sky. I chose it because it’s a famous landmark with colorful domes.
